description: Emmett Hollyer discusses his role as General Manager of Solana Mobile, the launch of products like Saga and Seeker, and the integration of crypto with mobile technology. He shares insights on the development process and the excitement surrounding their innovative phone design.
topic_summary: Emmett Hollyer, GM of Solana Mobile, shares insights on the company's mobile projects, including the Saga phone and the integration of crypto into mobile technology. He reflects on his journey with Solana and the transformative potential of mobile in the crypto space [t=0:08 - t=156:49].
